name: 数字规律
subject: math
domain_name: 代数思维 / Algebraic Thinking / Algebraic Thinking
curriculum_points: 4.OA.5 Generate a number or shape pattern that follows a given rule. Identify apparent features of the pattern that were not explicit in the rule itself. For example, given the rule “Add 3” and the starting number 1, generate terms in the resulting sequence and observe that the terms appear to alternate between odd and even numbers. Explain informally why the numbers will continue to alternate in this way.

5.OA.3 Generate two numerical patterns using two given rules. Identify apparent relationships between corresponding terms. Form ordered pairs consisting of corresponding terms from the two patterns, and graph the ordered pairs on a coordinate plane.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「数字规律」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：4.OA.5 Generate a number or shape pattern that follows a given rule. Identify apparent features of the pattern that were…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：5.OA.3 Generate two numerical patterns using two given rules. Identify apparent … 对理解「数字规律」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
